instruction: Open TextEdit and type the sentence {PHRASE} into a new document.
source: cove-original (design 047 §5 Tier-C Apple Events). Reads the front TextEdit document's text via AppleScript; the no-op leaves an empty document so the substring check scores 0.

args: osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to activate' -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to make new document' 2>/dev/null || true
osascript -e 'tell application "TextEdit" to set text of front document to "{PHRASE}"' 2>/dev/null || true

result.script: tell application "TextEdit" to get text of front document
